title: Bachelor of Vocation (Multimedia and Visual Communication) in association with Ecole Intuit Lab
content: The Multimedia and Visual Communication is a 4-year undergraduate program offered by Galgotias University in collaboration with the French Institute of Design and Creative Strategy, École Intuit Lab India. This partnership aims to boost employability and industry readiness by integrating hands-on training and real-world projects throughout its curriculum including industry internships. The program is designed to develop practical skills and prepare students for diverse design careers such as Art Direction, Digital Design, Brand Strategy, Typography, Advertising, Illustration, Communication, and Graphic Design. Pass in Class XII in any stream or higher, with passion for design and a flair of creativity.
